title: Green Pepper Wrap
description: This crisp and flavorful Green Pepper Wrap is a quick and easy weeknight meal that combines fermented green peppers with toasted bread for a satisfying snack or light supper.

ingredients.name: Fermented Green Peppers
ingredients.notes: Use halal-certified fermented green peppers if available.

ingredients.name: Thousand Island Dressing
ingredients.notes: Halal-friendly Thousand Island dressing can be used.

ingredients.name: Toasted Bread
ingredients.notes: Whole grain or multigrain bread for added nutrition and texture.

instructions: Prepare the fermented green peppers by slicing them thinly.
Toast the slices of bread until golden brown on both sides.
Spread Thousand Island dressing evenly over each slice of toasted bread.
Place sliced fermented green peppers on top of the dressings.
Add hummus for a dip if desired and serve immediately.
